candidate_problems.text: What would count as a boundary-preserving ontology in which zeros, primes, and symmetry are represented as one object and off-line zeros become structurally impossible?
Which existing equivalent formulations of RH most nearly function as truth-preserving scoring rules at infinity rather than merely restating the conjecture?
Can an AI system be designed to search specifically for invariants that eliminate infinite families of off-line-zero failure modes instead of searching proof strings?
